channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Manitoba Faces Fiscal Challenges Due to Increasing Natural Disasters
item.description: Manitoba is grappling with significant fiscal challenges as more frequent floods and wildfires strain its provincial budget. The combined cost of wildfires and flooding over the past two years has rea...

item.title: Nigerian Army Commanders Push For Welfare Projects To Boost Troop Morale And Efficiency
item.description: The General Officer Commanding (GOC) 6 Division, Nigerian Army, Major General Emmanuel Emekah, has called on commanders to prioritize welfare projects that enhance troop living conditions and operatio...

item.title: Media Silence and the Genocide in Gaza: A Critique of Journalism
item.description: The article critiques the media's complicity in downplaying the atrocities committed by Israeli forces in Gaza, labeling the situation as genocide. It highlights systemic failures in journalism, where...

item.title: Maja Salvador returns in 'Someone, Someday' with ABS-CBN's new primetime series
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios has released exclusive glimpses of Maja Salvador's anticipated return to primetime television through her upcoming project 'Someone, Someday'. The teaser showcases scenes that highligh...

item.title: HARMAN and PES University Collaborate on Next-Gen Automobile Software Development
item.description: HARMAN, a Stamford-based company specializing in connected automotive technologies, has partnered with PES University in Bengaluru to develop software for next-generation automobiles. The collaboratio...

item.title: B.C. Faces Escalating Wildfire Crisis as Lightning Sparks Over 100 Fires
item.description: British Columbia is experiencing a dramatic surge in wildfires, with lightning strikes triggering over 100 blazes in a single day. As of Saturday, the province reported 113 active fires, a sharp incre...

item.title: Universities fail to provide trauma-informed support for students amid Hamas-Israel conflict
item.description: The Royal Commission on Antisemitism and Social Cohesion has heard evidence that Australian universities failed to adequately protect Jewish students and staff from the psychological impact of pro-Pal...

item.title: Tanzania Expands Tanga Port Capacity with Over TZS 429 Billion Investment
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has allocated over TZS 429 billion to expand the Tanga Port, doubling its annual cargo capacity from 0.75 million to 3 million metric tonnes. This investment enables the por...

item.title: Nigerian Activist Demands Independent Probe Into Mary Habila's Death
item.description: Human rights activist Agena R. Ande is pushing for a full criminal investigation, independent autopsy, and coroner's inquest into the death of Mary Habila, a physiotherapist found dead in the house of...

item.title: Binibining Pilipinas 2026 Top 4 Answer Key Highlights
item.description: The article provides a transcript of the Q&A portion from the Binibining Pilipinas 2026 pageant, featuring the top four contestants. The segment highlights their responses to various questions, showca...

item.title: Pavement deliver an unconventional rendition of Led Zeppelin’s classic at Oakland festival
item.description: Pavement delivered an unexpected and loosely interpreted version of Led Zeppelin's 'Stairway To Heaven' during their first live show of the year at the Mosswood Meltdown pre-party in Oakland, Californ...

item.title: Springboks dominate Wales 43-0 in Nations Championship clash ahead of All Blacks showdown
item.description: South Africa's Springboks delivered a commanding 43-0 victory over Wales in Durban, setting the stage for a highly anticipated clash against New Zealand's All Blacks. The match highlighted the team's ...

item.title: Legal Expert Criticizes John Solomon's Contradictory Claims on Election Fraud and CIA Findings
item.description: The article details how John Solomon, co-leader of President Donald Trump's declassification task force, made conflicting claims about election fraud during an interview. Solomon suggested Venezuela's...

item.title: Trump at golf course as Iran conflict escalates, two U.S. service members killed
item.description: President Donald Trump was spotted at his Trump International Golf Club in Bedminster, New Jersey on July 28, 2022, hours after two U.S. service members were killed in Jordan during Iranian retaliatio...

item.title: Marcus Rashford's Goal Validated by Offside Rule Analysis in France vs England Match
item.description: England dominated France in a 4-0 first-half lead during the 2026 World Cup third-place play-off, with Bukayo Saka scoring twice alongside goals from Declan Rice and Ezri Konsa. The match sparked deba...

item.title: FIFA Introduces Championship Rings for 2026 World Cup Winners, Limited Editions for Fans
item.description: FIFA has announced a groundbreaking tradition for the 2026 World Cup final, where winning players will receive customized championship rings alongside the traditional trophy and gold medals. This mark...

item.title: Balancing Retirement and University Costs: A Financial Planning Guide
item.description: The article explores the financial dilemma of parents considering delaying retirement to fund their daughter's university education. It outlines a practical approach to estimate the additional years o...

item.title: Springbok Coach Rassie Erasmus Evaluates Vusi Moyo's Debut Performance Against Wales
item.description: Springbok coach Rassie Erasmus provided a measured assessment of Vusi Moyo's debut performance as the team's flyhalf in their 43-0 victory over Wales. Moyo, a 20-year-old Junior Springbok, made his in...

item.title: SADC bloc to enforce 28th meeting's resolutions for regional peace and stability
item.description: The Southern African Development Community (SADC) bloc has been assigned the critical responsibility of implementing resolutions from the 28th meeting aimed at ensuring regional peace and stability. T...

item.title: Tornado Warning Briefly Issued for Southern Ontario Communities
item.description: A tornado warning was briefly issued for parts of southern Ontario on Saturday, July 18, 2026, but was later lifted by Environment Canada. The warning, which came into effect around 12:20 p.m., was tr...
